PBT Accrual Variance Explanation

payload.claim_text: The unfavorable accrual variances for the month and YTD were primarily due to timing of booking accruals by MTA Accounting.
payload.subject: Petroleum Business Tax (PBT) Accrual

tool_args.label: Urban Tax Favorable Variance Explanation

payload.claim_text: Urban Tax transactions were on target with the forecast for the month, and year-to-date transactions were favorable primarily due to higher-than-forecasted commercial real estate transactions in New York City.
payload.subject: Urban Tax Accrual

tool_args.label: Mansion Tax Favorable Variance

payload.claim_text: Real Property Transfer Tax surcharge transactions for the month and year-to-date were favorable to the forecast.
payload.subject: Real Property Transfer Tax Surcharge (Mansion)

tool_args.label: City Subsidy for MTA Bus Company Variance Explanation

payload.claim_text: Variance was mostly due to lower expenses (mostly non-labor expenses) incurred by MTA Bus, as a result of timing. Lower expenses result in lower reimbursement from the City.
payload.subject: City Subsidy for MTA Bus Company

tool_args.label: B&T Surplus Transfer Variance

payload.claim_text: The favorable month and year-to-date variances were attributable to higher toll revenues and lower expenses.
payload.subject: B&T Operating Surplus Transfer

Urban Tax Cash Receipts Variance

payload.claim_text: Urban Tax receipts for the month and YTD were favorable due to better-than-expected real estate activity in NYC.
payload.subject: Urban Tax Cash Receipts

payload.claim_text: Variance was mostly due to lower expenses (mostly non-labor expenses) incurred by MTA Bus, as a result of timing. Lower expenses result in lower reimbursement from the City.

PMT Accrual Unfavorable Variance Timing

payload.claim_text: The unfavorable variances for the month, was due primarily to the timing of booking accruals by MTA Accounting. The year-to-date variance was favorable to the forecast also due primarily to the timing.
payload.subject: Payroll Mobility Tax (PMT) Accrual

tool_args.label: MRT-2 Accrual Unfavorable Activity

payload.claim_text: MRT-2 transactions were below the forecast for the month and year-to-date due to unfavorable MRT-2 activity.
payload.subject: MRT(b)-2 (Gross) Accrual

tool_args.label: MRT-1 Accrual Favorable Activity

payload.claim_text: MRT-1 transactions were below the forecast for the month, but year-to-date transactions were favorable due to better-than-expected MRT-1 activity.
payload.subject: MRT(b)-1 (Gross) Accrual

CDOT Subsidy Metro-North Cash Variance Explanation

payload.claim_text: The favorable variance for the month was primarily due to timing. YTD transactions were close to the target.
payload.subject: CDOT Subsidy for Metro-North Railroad Cash
